entry.title: A/B Testing Pitfalls: Statistical and Operational
entry.summary: The most common A/B testing mistakes across statistics, implementation, and stakeholder interpretation, with a practical prevention checklist.

entry.title: Attribution in Imperfect Data Environments
entry.summary: A practical attribution approach for teams dealing with partial tracking, privacy constraints, and measurement gaps across channels.

entry.title: Pricing Elasticity Experiments Without Destroying Trust
entry.summary: How to run pricing experiments with proper risk guardrails so you can learn elasticity without harming retention, trust, or perceived fairness.

entry.title: Retention Diagnostics Scorecard for Product and Growth Teams
entry.summary: A practical retention scorecard to identify whether your growth loop is sustainable, and where churn pressure actually starts.

entry.title: Activation Metrics That Matter: Beyond Vanity Conversion
entry.summary: How to define activation metrics that predict durable value, and avoid optimizing for shallow conversion events that do not retain.

entry.title: Acquisition Funnel Diagnostics: Find the Real Bottleneck
entry.summary: A framework for diagnosing acquisition funnel issues without mistaking channel mix shifts for product or conversion problems.

entry.title: Experimentation Framework: From Hypothesis to Decision
entry.summary: A practical system for running product and growth experiments end-to-end, from hypothesis quality to decision confidence and rollout discipline.

entry.title: SEO Metadata Checklist: Titles, OG, and Schema
entry.summary: A practical metadata checklist for article pages and archive routes, including title systems, Open Graph fields, and schema implementation details.

entry.title: Technical SEO Basics for a Clean, Indexable Site
entry.summary: The technical SEO baseline this website uses: canonical discipline, metadata consistency, structured data, and indexation hygiene.

entry.title: Hello World: Why This Blog Exists
entry.summary: The editorial mission behind this blog, who it serves, and how each article is designed to be implementation-ready for analytics and growth teams.
